goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 08:00'.
Make sure you get 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'whale of a time'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
